---
id: generate-vibe-app
title: "Run Vibe coding flow and stream progress updates"
description: "Starts a Vibe coding flow that generates a new Pulse App based on a user prompt."
sidebar_label: "Run Vibe coding flow and stream progress updates"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api-reference/app-server-functions/official-apps/vibe-dev-flow/vibe-dev-flow-generate-endpoint

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Run Vibe coding flow and stream progress updates"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/generate-code/v2/generate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Starts a Vibe coding flow that generates a new Pulse App based on a user prompt.

The response is a **Server-Sent Events (SSE)** stream where each event
contains a JSON-encoded message describing progress, tool calls, updates,
or final outputs.

Each SSE message is formatted as:
```
data: <JSON>
```

followed by a blank line.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Authorization","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Pulse Editor API key","example":"Bearer your_api_key_here"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["prompt","appName"],"properties":{"prompt":{"type":"string","description":"The user prompt instructing the Vibe coding agent","example":"Create a todo app with auth and dark mode"},"appName":{"type":"string","description":"Friendly display name for the app","example":"My Todo App"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Streaming Server-Sent Events (SSE) with progress and final result","content":{"text/event-stream":{"schema":{"type":"string","description":"SSE stream payload; clients should parse \"data: ...\" events. TODO: This will change to more structured JSON events in the future."},"examples":{"notification":{"summary":"Notification message","value":"data: {\"type\":\"creation\",\"messageId\":1,\"data\":{\"type\":\"notification\",\"title\":\"Starting Workspace\",\"description\":\"Starting workspace for app \\\"my_app_x7k9q2\\\"...\"}}\n"},"update":{"summary":"Update message","value":"data: {\"type\":\"update\",\"messageId\":1,\"updateType\":\"append\",\"delta\":{\"result\":\"Workspace started.\"},\"isFinal\":true}\n"},"artifact":{"summary":"Final artifact output","value":"data: {\"type\":\"creation\",\"messageId\":42,\"data\":{\"type\":\"artifactOutput\",\"title\":\"App Published\",\"description\":\"App published successfully!\",\"result\":\"{\\\"publishedAppLink\\\":\\\"https://pulse-editor.com/code?app=my_app_x7k9q2\\\"}\"},\"isFinal\":true}\n"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request (missing or invalid input)","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"},"examples":{"missing_prompt":{"value":"error: Bad Request: Missing prompt\n"}}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal Server Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
